creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
(In reply to kpielorz from comment #0)
it seems cacti's installer specifically checks for the mysql extension (even though it doesn't require it) *sigh*

I'll do a patch to sort that out.

If you don't want to wait, you can edit the file "/usr/local/share/cacti/install/index.php" on line 66 and change "mysql" to "mysqli"
